chain.thought: Explanation: Looking at the per-year win–loss records, the only year with more than 10 wins is 2010, with an 11–6 record.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table includes two “win–loss” rows: row 5 for Grand Slams and row 16 for Masters. Only row 16 shows a year with more than 10 wins: in 2010, the Masters win–loss is 11–6, which is above 10. No other year in either win–loss row exceeds 10 wins.
